title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for improving productivity with Claude Code: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video presents these as systematic approaches to 10x output when using Claude for code generation.
